questions.question: Do identical twins actually have identical DNA that makes them impossible to distinguish?
questions.rationale: Recent advances in DNA sequencing reveal that identical twins actually accumulate genetic differences over time, contradicting common assumptions
questions.misinformation_narrative: Popular belief holds that identical twins have completely identical DNA making them genetically indistinguishable, which has implications for forensics and paternity testing
questions.public_stakes: Misconceptions affect legal proceedings, forensic investigations, and understanding of genetic inheritance and disease risk in twins
questions.verification_reason: Crime shows, social media, and popular science content frequently perpetuate the myth that identical twins have completely identical DNA, affecting public understanding of forensics.

alternative_sources.organization_full: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
alternative_sources.resource_name: Pharmacist Services: A Growing Role in Health Care
alternative_sources.description: CDC overview of expanded pharmacist services including immunizations, medication therapy management, and clinical services
alternative_sources.relevance: Describes the scope of pharmacist services compared to traditional medical care

alternative_sources.resource_name: FDA's Role in Regulating Pharmacy Practice
alternative_sources.description: FDA guidance on regulatory boundaries between pharmacy practice and medical practice
alternative_sources.relevance: Defines regulatory distinctions between pharmacist and physician scope of practice

alternative_sources.resource_name: Pharmacist Patient Care Process
alternative_sources.description: APhA's standardized framework defining pharmacist clinical services and care responsibilities
alternative_sources.relevance: Establishes professional standards for pharmacist patient care activities

alternative_sources.resource_name: Pharmacists' Patient Care Process Standards
alternative_sources.description: Multi-organizational consensus document on pharmacist care delivery standards
alternative_sources.relevance: Provides authoritative definition of pharmacist clinical responsibilities versus physician care

questions.question: Should people with COVID-19 or other recent viral infections avoid certain vaccines?
questions.rationale: Corrects timing misconceptions about vaccination after illness that affect immunization schedules
questions.misinformation_narrative: Confusion about vaccination timing after viral infections leads to unnecessary delays or avoidance of needed immunizations
questions.public_stakes: Delayed vaccinations leave people vulnerable to preventable diseases based on misunderstood contraindications
questions.verification_reason: This describes legitimate medical uncertainty rather than a specific false belief circulating in public communities.
